requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for Mauritania PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量——毛里塔尼亚光伏逆变器项目的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——茅利塔尼亞光伏逆變器項目的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據

summary.en: No Mauritania-specific public EMC regulation for solar PV inverters was confirmed in the reviewed sources. For grid-tied or donor-financed PV projects, the practical EMC and power-quality evidence should therefore be anchored in IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and the applicable IEC 61000 series tests, including harmonic-current and compatibility limits as specified by the project engineer, SOMELEC, lender, or tender. Because Mauritania projects may be connected to weak networks, isolated grids, diesel-hybrid systems, or battery-backed mini-grids, harmonic emissions, flicker, conducted/radiated emissions, immunity, and inverter interactions with gensets or BESS controls should be reviewed at project level.
summary.zh: 在已审查来源中，未能确认毛里塔尼亚针对太阳能光伏逆变器的公开专用EMC法规。对于并网或捐助方融资光伏项目，实际EMC和电能质量证据应以IEC 62920光伏功率变换设备要求及适用IEC 61000系列测试为锚点，包括项目工程师、SOMELEC、贷款方或招标文件指定的谐波电流和兼容性限值。由于毛里塔尼亚项目可能接入弱电网、孤立电网、柴油混合系统或带电池的微网，应在项目层面审查谐波排放、闪变、传导/辐射发射、抗扰度以及逆变器与发电机组或储能控制的相互作用。
summary.zht: 在已審查來源中，未能確認茅利塔尼亞針對太陽能光伏逆變器的公開專用EMC法規。對於併網或捐助方融資光伏項目，實際EMC和電能品質證據應以IEC 62920光伏功率轉換設備要求及適用IEC 61000系列測試為錨點，包括項目工程師、SOMELEC、貸款方或招標文件指定的諧波電流和相容性限值。由於茅利塔尼亞項目可能接入弱電網、孤立電網、柴油混合系統或帶電池的微網，應在項目層面審查諧波排放、閃變、傳導/輻射發射、抗擾度以及逆變器與發電機組或儲能控制的相互作用。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility tests and limits, including harmonics, flicker, emissions, and immunity as specified by the project
SOMELEC or project-owner power-quality limits — confirm project-specific requirements
Donor/lender technical specifications — confirm whether IEC reports must be issued by an ILAC-accredited laboratory

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC files commonly rely on GB/T 37408 and related domestic laboratory reports. These may reference IEC 61000-family methods but are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 reports requested in international PV procurement. They also may not address Mauritania weak-grid harmonics, diesel-hybrid operation, or BESS interaction studies.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC文件通常依赖GB/T 37408及相关国内实验室报告。这些文件可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但不自动等同于国际光伏采购中要求的IEC 62920报告，也可能未覆盖毛里塔尼亚弱电网谐波、柴油混合运行或储能相互作用研究。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC文件通常依賴GB/T 37408及相關國內實驗室報告。這些文件可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但不自動等同於國際光伏採購中要求的IEC 62920報告，也可能未覆蓋茅利塔尼亞弱電網諧波、柴油混合運行或儲能相互作用研究。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China domestic EMC evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter model, rating, firmware family, and filter configuration. For weak-grid, mini-grid, diesel-hybrid, or BESS projects, provide harmonic and dynamic interaction studies using the site short-circuit level and generator/control assumptions specified by SOMELEC, the EPC, or the lender.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内EMC证据应补充针对准确逆变器型号、功率等级、固件系列和滤波配置的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000报告。对于弱电网、微网、柴油混合或储能项目，应使用SOMELEC、EPC或贷款方指定的场址短路容量和发电机/控制假设，提供谐波和动态相互作用研究。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內EMC證據應補充針對準確逆變器型號、功率等級、韌體系列和濾波配置的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000報告。對於弱電網、微網、柴油混合或儲能項目，應使用SOMELEC、EPC或貸款方指定的場址短路容量和發電機/控制假設，提供諧波和動態相互作用研究。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by SOMELEC, tender, EPC specification, lender procurement rules, or project-owner grid study; no standalone public Mauritania PV-inverter EMC regulation was confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or procurement-driven for many China domestic PV inverter files; not transferable as Mauritania IEC EMC acceptance without project confirmation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T EMC certificates are not enough for a Mauritania project file unless SOMELEC, the EPC, and the lender explicitly accept them. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 evidence, then add project-level harmonic and weak-grid studies where the inverter connects to mini-grids, diesel-hybrid systems, BESS, or constrained feeders.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非SOMELEC、EPC和贷款方明确接受，中国GB/T EMC证书不足以构成毛里塔尼亚项目文件。请准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000证据；若逆变器接入微网、柴油混合系统、储能或受限馈线，还应增加项目层面的谐波和弱电网研究。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非SOMELEC、EPC和貸款方明確接受，中國GB/T EMC證書不足以構成茅利塔尼亞項目文件。請準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000證據；若逆變器接入微網、柴油混合系統、儲能或受限饋線，還應增加項目層面的諧波和弱電網研究。
